title: NexCMS
tagline: A lightweight headless CMS built for developers who hate complexity.
description: NexCMS is a minimal headless content management system with a clean admin UI, a REST API for content delivery, and a schema-first approach that lets you define your content types in a single config file.
story: Every CMS I tried was either too heavy (WordPress), too expensive (Contentful), or too opinionated (Sanity). NexCMS is the CMS I always wanted: define your schema, get an API, done.
forWho: Developers building content-driven sites who want the control of a custom backend without the overhead of a full CMS platform.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Express REST API with a schema-defined data layer. Content types are defined in a JSON config; the API auto-generates CRUD endpoints for each type.
keyPatterns: SQLite with dynamic table creation per content type
